meaning: n.[动]臭鼬,臭鼬皮,讨厌鬼vt.使惨败,欺骗
examples: This is the second [or third] skunk we've got.
Tease a skunk in Minnesota, and it can haul you off to jail.
Skunk, a noxious liquid mixture of nontoxic ingredients including baking powder and yeast, is blasted onto protesters from a water cannon.
Some members of Team Skunk decorate "road kill" skunks with Mardi Gras-style beaded necklaces.
In 1972, he scored the hit "Dead Skunk" and has recorded 20 albums since then.
